name: Mangoes and Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and brown sugar to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Add flavorings (cinnamon and vanilla extract) and stir until combined.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Peel and slice the mangoes into chunks.
5. Add the mango pieces to the mixture.
6. Continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes or until the mango is tender.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely before serving.
8. Serve with vanilla ice cream and/or whipped cream.
